# Agentic Realty — Full Reference

> The AI automation studio for real estate, built in Accra, Ghana.
> Ghana's first PropTech company running AI agents for real estate, and as of
> 2026 the only one. Nine managed AI systems covering sales, marketing, and
> operations, all reporting into one CRM.

Canonical site: https://agenticrealty.co
Short summary: https://agenticrealty.co/llms.txt

## Who Agentic Realty Is

Agentic Realty designs, builds, and operates AI systems for real estate
agencies. It is not a listings portal and not a brokerage: it is the automation
studio that runs the machinery behind agencies, so agents spend their time on
viewings and closings instead of admin.

- Founded: 2025, Accra, Ghana
- Serves: real estate agencies in Accra and Greater Accra (East Legon,
  Cantonments, Airport Residential, Labone, Dzorwulu, Tema, Adenta)
- Slogan: "Sell homes. We run everything else."
- Flagship product: Ama, an AI sales agent that lives on WhatsApp
- Delivery model: fully managed service. Agentic Realty builds each system,
  runs it, monitors it around the clock, and tunes it on the agency's real
  conversations. Self-hosted deployment available on request.

## The Problem It Solves

Real estate agencies leak money in three places:

1. **Coverage.** The best lead messages at 11pm, gets a reply at 8am, and by
   10am has booked a viewing with another agency. One slow reply costs a
   GHS 5,000 to 15,000 commission.
2. **Visibility.** Great listings sit online for months with a few dark
   photos. No walkthrough, no video, no posting rhythm.
3. **Operations.** Offers typed from scratch, leases chased for signatures,
   rent reminders sent by hand. Selling hours lost to admin.

Hiring another agent does not fix this: it costs GHS 3,000+ per month in
salary, takes about four weeks to train, often leaves within months, and still
does not answer at 11pm.

## The Nine Systems (Detailed)

### 1. WhatsApp Sales Agent (flagship)
Ama answers every WhatsApp property inquiry in under 5 seconds, at any hour,
in English, Twi, or Ghanaian pidgin. She qualifies budget, preferred area, and
bedroom count; recommends matching homes from the agency's live inventory;
books viewings from real agent availability; sends reminders 24 hours and
2 hours before each viewing; follows up on Day 3, 7, 14, and 30 if a lead goes
quiet; and escalates complaints, VIPs, and tricky questions to a human
immediately. Leads can send voice notes; Ama transcribes and replies normally.
She never quotes a price the lead did not mention, never invents property
features, and never pushes after a no (14 enforced safety rules).

### 2. AI Property Recommendations
Every lead is matched against live inventory, in budget and in area, never
over. When the agency adds a listing, every matched waiting buyer hears about
it within minutes, exactly once, with a message written for them rather than a
broadcast blast. Preferences are learned from the conversation, not a form.

### 3. 3D Property Walkthroughs
Full 3D walkthroughs of listings, shared as a simple link on WhatsApp. They
work on any phone with no app to install. Serious buyers arrive at viewings
already sold on the layout; casual browsers filter themselves out before
anyone drives across Accra.

### 4. Lead Harvesting
Leads from Meta ads, marketplace listings, property portals, the agency
website, and social DMs are captured, deduplicated, and dropped into one
pipeline with the first reply already sent. Every source is tracked.

### 5. Social Media Autopilot
Each new listing becomes a scheduled run of posts and reels across the
agency's pages. The agency stays visible every day without manual posting,
with one consolidated monthly report.

### 6. Customer Review Harvesting
The review ask goes out at the happiest moment, right after keys change hands.
Happy clients are routed to Google Reviews. Unhappy clients are routed to the
agency owner privately, before anything goes public.

### 7. Document and Contract Automation
Offers, leases, and mandates are drafted from CRM data, sent for e-signature
on any phone, chased automatically, and filed against the deal. No retyping
client names into Word templates.

### 8. Property Management Automation
Rent reminders, renewal notices, and maintenance requests handled on WhatsApp
on schedule. Maintenance intake is routed to the right person. Owners receive
statements without asking.

### 9. Free Business Workflow Audit
A working session with the agency's team that maps how a lead, a listing, and
a lease actually move through the business. The agency keeps a written
bottleneck report and a prioritised automation plan, free, whether or not they
hire Agentic Realty afterwards. This is the recommended starting point.

## Proof (Verified in Production)

- 31 out of 31 graded test cases passed, covering truth, rapport, tone,
  escalation, knowledge, and database state, re-run on every system change
- 0 fabrications detected in independent audit (including a hostile buyer run,
  a prompt injection attempt, an overpromise trap, and a fabrication bait)
- Median first reply under 5 seconds, measured in production
- 14 safety rules enforced in every conversation
- 6 Meta-approved WhatsApp templates live
- 15 live automations running 24/7

Agency owners can watch the raw database records being pulled during the demo.

## How the Flagship Works

1. A lead messages the agency's WhatsApp. Ama greets them in their own
   register, works out budget, location, and bedrooms, and the lead lands in
   the CRM with everything captured.
2. Ama recommends in-budget homes, offers three viewing slots, books the
   chosen one, and pauses follow-ups automatically.
3. The human agent receives a briefed lead, reminders fire before the viewing,
   and after the deal closes Ama requests a Google review.

Agents update the CRM from the field by texting or voice-noting a Telegram
bot: add a listing, log a note, query leads. Nothing can be deleted by chat,
by design.

## Onboarding

Five working days from yes to the first live lead on the flagship WhatsApp
agent, with about four hours of the agency's time in total. The other eight
systems are scoped in the free workflow audit and rolled out at the agency's
pace.

## Pricing and Terms

There is no published price list; scope depends on which systems are switched
on and is agreed on the demo call. Fixed terms: no per-seat fees, no lock-in,
cancel any month with 14 days notice, full data export anytime in standard
formats. The business workflow audit is free. The CRM is open source, so an
agency could self-host everything if Agentic Realty disappeared.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Does Ama replace human agents?**
No. She handles the first 80% (first touch, qualification, scheduling,
follow-up) so human agents close the last 20%. Anything she cannot handle
escalates to a human immediately.

**Do agencies have to take all nine systems?**
No. Most start with the WhatsApp sales agent or the free workflow audit and
add systems as they pay for themselves. Each system stands alone; they
compound because everything reports into the same CRM.

**Will clients know they are chatting with an AI?**
Ama sounds like a warm, human member of the team. Whether and how the agency
discloses that she is AI is the agency's call, set as policy during
onboarding.

**What happens when the AI makes a mistake?**
Four safety nets: 14 hard conversation rules, instant escalation to a human
inbox, per-lead silence (flag a VIP as agent-only), and name verification
before any booking. A 31-point graded exam runs on every system change.

**Where does the data live?**
On dedicated infrastructure managed by Agentic Realty, or on the agency's own
servers. Data is never sold, mined, or shared, and can be exported anytime.

**How fast can an agency go live?**
Five working days for the flagship WhatsApp agent. Other systems are scoped in
the free audit.

## Technology

Claude API (Anthropic) for reasoning and conversation; WhatsApp Cloud API
(Meta) and Telegram Bot API for messaging; Twenty CRM (open source,
self-hosted); n8n for workflow orchestration; PostgreSQL; Docker Compose on a
dedicated VPS.
